ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Addormentati Academy in Naples. For Badiale`s affiliation to the Addormentati see Giacomo Badiale, La forza delle stelle ovvero amare è destino, Napoli, Trojse, 1693.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
